Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After many hard-fought battles, our[n]team has suffered our first casualty...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A dear friend's life has been claimed in[n]a manner I never could have imagined...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That night, no one spoke a word.[n]{f 1 1}
